title: Crypto Markets Today, May 1: Bitcoin Holds Above $78,000 as Tech Stocks Set New Highs
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Bitcoin held above $78,000 on May 1, rising 2.5% to $78,292. Ethereum also gained 1.6%. Tech stocks reached new highs.
